response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong recent alignment to the required stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz, plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship through TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source leadership (GISCollective). Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL mentions, and Kotlin is absent from the skills list.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework work at re:cinq matches the AI agent requirement exactly
Deep full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker across senior roles
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, code katas, and open-source maintenance
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (Jest/testing background should transfer)
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (2016-2018) and not in current skills list
PostgreSQL not mentioned — relational DB experience limited to MySQL/SQL references

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent and MCP tooling experience
